form.formComment: Won two starts back over 340m at this track. Last start he finished 2nd over 431m at this track beaten 2.5 lengths (24.98) behind Mully The Master in a Grade 5 on March 25. Draw likely to suit. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

form.formComment: Has won her last two. Good effort to score just three days ago over 340m at this track by 6 lengths in a NG. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has won her last two. Good effort to score just three days ago over 340m at this track by 6 lengths in a NG. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began moderately; Was checked soon after the start; Finished the race strongly.
Tightened for room and lost ground entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth in a NG on April 4 over 340m at this track behind Warlord Nev, beaten 7 lengths (20.16). Other runners look much more appealing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished fifth in a NG on April 4 over 340m at this track behind Warlord Nev, beaten 7 lengths (20.16). Other runners look much more appealing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together on entering the home straight.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (20.17) in a Grade 5, finishing a nose second. Has three successes and two minors from 10 starts from box 4. Expected to go close.

form.formComment: Missed the frame when eighth (19.62) at Dubbo at last run and returns here after a four-and-a-half months break. Looks tested.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame when eighth (19.62) at Dubbo at last run and returns here after a four-and-a-half months break. Looks tested.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped onto heels at the turn out of the back straight and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when third (17.59) over 300m at Taree Super Track. Has to overcome a wide draw but is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Last start finished 7th on April 1 over 300m at Taree Super Track behind Jet Boots Tommy beaten 13 lengths (18.17) in a Grade 4/5. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.comment: Last start finished 7th on April 1 over 300m at Taree Super Track behind Jet Boots Tommy beaten 13 lengths (18.17) in a Grade 4/5. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.53) when fifth over 300m at Casino in a Grade 4/5. Has two wins and two placings from seven starts from the draw. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 340m at this track. Happy to risk in this.
